modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about the components of the Excel ribbon.

full_description_text: User asked about the ribbon in Excel. They wanted to know what it includes. The question came up during a live chat.

description: User asked about the ribbon in Excel. They wanted to know what it includes. The question came up during a live chat.
